# Spectrum Web Components (2nd-gen)

> 2nd-gen (@adobe/swc) component library implementing the Spectrum design system.
> This index lists components and links to their static documentation.


## Components
- [Asset](2nd-gen/components/asset.md): Visually represent files, folders, or images in your application
- [Badge](2nd-gen/components/badge.md): Display small amounts of color-categorized metadata to get a user's attention.
- [Divider](2nd-gen/components/divider.md): Visual separator for grouping and dividing content
- [Progress Circle](2nd-gen/components/progress-circle.md): Progress circles show the progression of a system operation such as downloading, uploading, processing, etc. in a visual way.
- [Status Light](2nd-gen/components/status-light.md): Status lights convey semantic meaning through colored dots accompanied by descriptive text.
